name: RainViewer Precipitation Radar
description: Near real-time precipitation radar tile overlay from RainViewer for storm and rain intensity visualization.

metadata.label: RainViewer Precipitation Radar
metadata.constraints: Time-indexed radar tiles; coverage and licensing vary by region and usage scenario.
metadata.human_summary: Radar precipitation overlay for rapid rain and storm intensity context in a selected area.
disambiguation_notes: Use this for near real-time rain intensity. For broader forecast trends, use forecast weather layers.
integration_requirements: No API key required for basic RainViewer usage
